{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Damascan Kingdom
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Damascan Kingdom]] is a kingdom.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c19">''House of Blades'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Damascan Kingdom]] includes villages that consider themselves separate from the [[Kingdom]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Nations and empires]]
